title: ilex crenata f. convexa
intro: Ilex crenata f. convexa, also known as the Japanese holly or glossy-leafed holly, is a variety of the ilex crenata plant, a type of evergreen shrub native to East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce pain, fever, and swelling, as well as protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. The health benefits of Ilex crenata f. convexa include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and berries of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
